workflow.name: Score B2B leads with OpenAI from webhook or form submissions
workflow.description:
## How it works

• Receives lead data (name, email, company, website) from a webhook or manual trigger
• Normalizes the payload and sends it to OpenAI for scoring (1–10)
• Routes leads to Hot (≥7, immediate follow-up) or Nurture (add to sequence)
• Output includes score, status, and action recommendation

## Set up steps

• Add Auth credential for OpenAI - ~2 min
• Activate the workflow and copy your webhook URL
• Test with Manual trigger or POST to webhook with `{"name","email","company","website"}`

workflow.name: Score B2B leads with AI from webhook or form submissions

parameters.content:
## Score B2B Leads with AI

**Who it's for:** Sales teams, freelancers, and agencies receiving leads via webhook or contact forms.

**What it does:** Receives lead data (name, email, company, website), uses OpenAI to score each lead 1–10 based on fit, and routes to **Hot** (≥7 → immediate follow-up) or **Nurture** (add to sequence).

**Setup:** Add your OpenAI API key via pre-configured credentials in the AI Score Lead node. No hardcoded keys. Activate the workflow and test with Manual or send a POST to the webhook URL.

**Step 1 — Triggers**

• Webhook: POST to `/incoming-lead`
• Manual: Test with sample data

**Step 5 — Route**

Hot (≥7) → immediate follow-up  |  Nurture → add to sequence

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
